body.u: When I was 16 I left school coming out into the large rough world. When I left I had to look around for a job. Till one day some one took me on as a part time cleaner not having much brains. This is all was fit for I stayed there tilluntilisI was about 18 ½ were I left and decided to look around for something better tilluntil I was about 19 I did not have a job I could not afford any equipment for hobbies. So one day I was walking down to the social securetssecurity office when I saw a poster skilled men wanted. I took note and decided to go for an interview next day I went to the works and met the manager he I ask me questions and I answered him not knowing much about it. He then said thank you very much we will consider you. I waited and waited till one day a little brown letter addressed to me came through the door it said

You have been consider for a aprentershipapprenticeship for the job £90.00 per week. I could not belivebelieve it. When I started the job I found it hard but with a little super visionsupervision I picked it up quickly. After I had been there for a few months I was rich. 21 and I was smartly dressed had my own house my own car and my hobbies started coming. Most of the time I would be fishing or shooting till one night I went to my friend party I had a few drinks and was social but I also met a girl and went out with her after about a year and a ½-2 we decided to get married. I’d just turned 23 the years shot by and I had now turned 36 I never felt so fed up I had to stay in and help the wife every night could not go with my mates down the pub. Soon my hair turned grey my wife died and I was a lonely old man I was 59 my job was still going well. A few years later I was an old aged pensioner and I sat there thinking of when I was young. What I could do all those things n now I can only stay indoors and watch telleytelly or listen to the radio.
